name: Total Records
description: Total number of clinical database records or encounters registered.

name: Total Patients
description: Total count of unique patient identifiers registered in the dataset.

name: Unique Diagnoses
description: Count of distinct medical conditions/diagnoses treated.

name: Most Common Diagnosis
description: The disease category with the highest incidence caseload.

name: Average Patient Age
description: The arithmetic mean age of the patient cohort.

name: Recovery Rate
description: Percentage of patients with recovery outcome status.

name: Mortality Rate
description: Percentage of patient cases resulting in mortality.

name: Facility Count
description: Number of distinct clinics or hospital providers reporting data.

name: Reporting Regions
description: Total unique geographical zipcodes or regions mapped.

name: Average Hospital Stay
description: Average duration of stay in days for hospitalized patients.

name: Average BMI
description: Average Body Mass Index across the patient profile.

name: Total Admissions
description: Total number of admissions recorded over the timeframe.

name: Total Discharges
description: Total number of successful discharge releases recorded.

name: Dataset Completeness
description: Percentage of non-null cells across the entire dataset matrix.

name: Data Quality Score
description: Composite data health rating score (0 to 100).
